originalPrompt: Create a minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. One HTML, responsive, hero + subtitle, services list, contact form (no backend; alert). Colors: red/black/white only. Include README and one Jest test that asserts hero title is present.

subtasks.title: Initialize project structure
subtasks.description: Create a minimal project with index.html (single page), styles.css, script.js, README.md, and package.json, linking CSS and JS in the HTML and adding a basic semantic HTML skeleton.
subtasks.successCriteria: Repository contains index.html, styles.css, script.js, README.md, and package.json; index.html correctly links styles.css and script.js; opening index.html shows no console errors.

subtasks.title: Implement responsive layout and styles
subtasks.description: Add mobile-first CSS using only red, black, and white; define simple layout, typography, spacing, and media queries to ensure the page adapts well on small and large screens with good contrast.
subtasks.successCriteria: At 360px and 1200px widths, layout has no horizontal scrollbars; CSS color values are limited to red, black, and white (including shades only of these); text is readable with sufficient contrast.

subtasks.title: Add hero section and subtitle
subtasks.description: Create a hero section in index.html with a prominent, accessible title (h1) and a subtitle (p) that introduces the lab technician; ensure the section is styled responsively.
subtasks.successCriteria: Hero contains an h1 and a descriptive subtitle; text is visible on both light and dark backgrounds; structure validates with no HTML errors.

subtasks.title: Add services list section
subtasks.description: Insert a services section listing key offerings using semantic HTML (e.g., section with h2 and ul/li items) and ensure spacing and layout match the overall style.
subtasks.successCriteria: Services section displays at least three concise items; list is readable on mobile and desktop; no additional colors beyond red, black, and white are introduced.

subtasks.title: Add contact form with alert behavior
subtasks.description: Create a contact form with labeled fields for name, email, and message; prevent default submission in script.js and show an alert confirming submission; use basic HTML5 validation.
subtasks.successCriteria: Submitting the form triggers a JavaScript alert and does not navigate away; labels are associated with inputs; required fields prevent empty submission; no backend calls are made.

subtasks.title: Set up Jest and write hero title test
subtasks.description: Configure Jest in package.json with jsdom environment and add a test that loads index.html and asserts that the hero title element is present (e.g., by role or data-testid).
subtasks.successCriteria: Running `npm test` executes Jest successfully and the test passes by confirming the hero title exists in the DOM.

subtasks.title: Write README with usage and test instructions
subtasks.description: Draft README.md describing the project purpose, how to open the site, how to run tests, design choices (red/black/white only), and how responsiveness is handled.
subtasks.successCriteria: README includes setup steps, run instructions for tests, feature list (hero, services, contact form with alert), color policy, and notes on responsiveness.

decompositionStrategy: Feature-based sequential plan with dependency chaining for build, styling, features, testing, and documentation
